subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which Thou hast attracted the hearts of the sincere ones and their inmost hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الذی به اجتذبت قلوب المخلصین و افئده
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
